info.description: One company tile in the home-page portfolio grid.

name.description: Company name shown on the tile, e.g. SpaceX.

allocation.description: Percentage of the fund, with the % sign, e.g. 19.37%.

ticker.description: Public ticker if the company has one, e.g. $FIG (optional).

ipo.description: Tick to show the IPO badge on this tile.

logo.description: Company logo shown on the tile.
